summary: Planned conservative non-mutating classifications for five open PR inventory items. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No security-sensitive refs were detected.

actions.reason: Useful, open, independently scoped PR with sufficient proof and maintainer-review status; no duplicate, supersession, low-signal, or closure basis in this inventory cluster.
Open, independently scoped PR that needs proof before any maintainer merge decision; failing proof blocks merge/fixed-by-candidate handling but does not justify closure.
Maintainer-owned, broad, independently scoped PR with proof but failing checks and compatibility risk; no closure basis and merge/fix actions are blocked by the job.
Open, independently scoped PR with unresolved proof/check blockers; not duplicate, superseded, or low-signal based on hydrated evidence.
Draft maintainer-owned work in progress waiting on author; no closure, duplicate, low-signal, or replacement action is allowed or appropriate for this inventory shard.
